race.comment: WHATYOUTALKINBOUT (2) got back to winning ways last time out when scoring by 1L over this track and trip 21 days ago. Faithfull hops back on board today and he has enough speed to get across from the wide draw. Can roll forward and bring up back-to-back wins. DEEPLY ROOTED (3) steps out to this trip for just the second time after seeming to lack some speed over the shorter distances recently. Nottle rides now from a wide draw which doesn't hurt with his racing pattern. Still possesses some upside and can put his best foot forward. BUON AMICI (4) bounced back to form last start with a 1.2L defeat here at this track and trip behind WHATYOUTALKINBOUT. He'll meet that runner better at the weights and he too has good early speed. Can be in this for a very long way. THE CANDY KID (12) won't be far away. SHOOT TO FAME (8) is next best.
